channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: JMFyang Shares Fun and Honest Insights in Lie Detector Game
item.description: In a lively episode of the Lie Detector game, JMFyang candidly shared personal insights that had fans feeling kilig. The game, designed to reveal honest answers, allowed JMFyang to open up about crush...

item.title: Albanese government delays scaling back electric vehicle subsidy for another year
item.description: The Albanese government has announced it will continue offering a tax break for electric vehicle (EV) purchases for another 12 months before gradually scaling back the scheme. The policy, which has ex...

item.title: Vehicle Crashes Into Worshippers During Juma’at Prayer in Yobe, 2 Dead, 32 Injured
item.description: A tragic accident occurred on Friday at the JIBWIS Juma’at Mosque along the Kano–Maiduguri highway in Damagum, Yobe State. A commercial passenger bus lost control and crashed into worshippers who were...

item.title: Ongoing Cyberattacks Target cPanel Servers Exploiting Critical Vulnerability
item.description: Nearly a week after cPanel and WebHost Manager (WHM) disclosed a critical vulnerability in their web server management software, cybercriminals continue to exploit the flaw, putting thousands of websi...

item.title: Jeremy Bamber restricted from contacting media while serving life sentence for family murders
item.description: Jeremy Bamber, aged 65 and currently held in HMP Wakefield, has been prohibited from communicating with journalists via letters or telephone calls. Bamber was convicted in 1986 for the 1985 murders of...

item.title: Britney Spears avoids jail by pleading guilty to reckless driving
item.description: Pop icon Britney Spears has reportedly entered a guilty plea for reckless driving, a decision aimed at avoiding incarceration. The incident, which involved her being charged with driving recklessly, h...

item.title: Beyond physical damage: how Cyclone Idai reshaped lives and communities in Zimbabwe
item.description: This article explains say when climate disasters happen, the damage no be only about houses or money wey go take rebuild. The real impact dey deeper, affecting people emotionally, socially and cultura...

item.title: Kenya Power to Conduct Scheduled Maintenance Causing Temporary Power Outages in Six Counties
item.description: Kenya Power and Lighting Company (KPLC) has issued a notice to residents in six counties about planned electricity outages set for Tuesday, May 5. The maintenance work aims to upgrade, replace power l...

item.title: World Leaders Push to Reduce Methane Emissions Amid Energy Shortages
item.description: As energy wahala dey increase because of war for Middle East, world leaders dey push make action to reduce methane emissions quick-quick. About 60 percent of methane dey come from human activity, and ...

item.title: Tanzania's economy to grow by 6.1% in Q2 2026, driven by agriculture and mining
item.description: Tanzania's economy is expected to grow by 6.1% in the second quarter of 2026, supported by strong agricultural output and a thriving mining sector. Despite global economic challenges, the country's GD...

item.title: BJP’s Suvendu Adhikari Wins Bhabanipur, Defeating Mamata Banerjee
item.description: In a major political upset, Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) leader Suvendu Adhikari defeated West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee in the Bhabanipur assembly seat by over 15,000 votes, according to ...

item.title: Confederation Bridge reopens after temporary closure due to severe weather
item.description: The Confederation Bridge, linking New Brunswick and Prince Edward Island, has reopened following a temporary closure caused by severe weather conditions, including heavy rainfall and strong winds. Aut...

item.title: Rivers Police Arrest 13 Suspects After Journalist Assault in Known Crime Area
item.description: For Rivers State, police dem don carry out serious operation for Olu-Obasanjo area and nearby places for Port Harcourt after journalist Allwell Ene suffer assault while e dey do investigative work. Th...

item.title: Royal Commission Highlights Daily Anti-Semitism Faced by Jewish Australians
item.description: The Royal Commission into anti-Semitism and social cohesion has revealed the daily realities faced by Australia's Jewish community. Witnesses described living with constant precautions, from assessing...

item.title: Kamala Harris Supports Mayor Karen Bass in Los Angeles Mayoral Race
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris endorsed Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass for reelection, highlighting Bass’ achievements in reducing homelessness and crime. The endorsement comes as ballots arrive in...

item.title: P. Viswanathan of Congress Secures Narrow Victory in Melur Assembly Polls 2026
item.description: In the recently concluded 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, the Melur constituency witnessed a tightly contested race. Indian National Congress (INC) candidate P. Viswanathan emerged victorious, sec...

item.title: Big Ten Challenges Amazon-Duke Streaming Deal Over Michigan Game Rights
item.description: Amazon’s newly announced partnership with Duke University to stream select non-conference basketball games has quickly encountered complications, highlighting the complexity of college sports media ri...

item.title: Raghav Chadha Congratulates BJP on West Bengal Election Victory
item.description: Rajya Sabha member Raghav Chadha extended his congratulations to the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) for their remarkable performance in the 2026 West Bengal Assembly Elections. The BJP has secured 207 s...

item.title: TotalEnergies Kenya Reports KSh 2.17 Billion Profit Despite Revenue Drop
item.description: TotalEnergies Marketing Kenya has reported a net profit of KSh 2.17 billion for the year ending December 2025, marking a 45.9 percent increase from the previous year. This growth came despite a declin...

item.title: DUI Driver in Salinas Crashes Into Ambulance, Injuring Two EMTs
item.description: In Salinas, California, an ambulance responding to a medical emergency with lights and siren activated was struck head-on by a Chevy Cruze driven by an allegedly intoxicated driver, Armando Ortiz Mend...
